messages.speaker: Mike Chen
messages.text: Quinn, exciting to discuss the multi-year engagement. Your CTO seemed very positive last week.

messages.speaker: Quinn Roberts
messages.text: She is. But we need to address pricing before we can get budget approval for a 3-year commitment.

messages.speaker: Mike Chen
messages.text: What pricing structure works best for your team?

messages.speaker: Quinn Roberts
messages.text: We'd like a volume discount. At 500+ seats, per-seat pricing needs to come down.

messages.speaker: Mike Chen
messages.text: We can definitely explore tiered pricing. What's the competitor landscape look like for you?

messages.speaker: Quinn Roberts
messages.text: We've been approached by MegaSuite. Their enterprise offering is aggressive on pricing.

messages.speaker: Mike Chen
messages.text: MegaSuite has a different architecture that doesn't scale the same way. Let me put together a TCO comparison.

messages.speaker: Quinn Roberts
messages.text: That would be great. Also send the executive summary deck — I need to present to the board next week.
